overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character with black hair and a blue jacket walking through a futuristic indoor commercial area, approaching a mineral sales counter, and interacting with a vendor. The environment features metallic walls, industrial lighting, and displays of rocks and minerals.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi corridor with mineral sample displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor past mineral displays, following a red-haired woman toward the sales area

notable_agents.action: red-haired woman walking ahead toward the sales counter

entered.detail: stack of grey storage crates on a metal cart
illuminated display counter with various rock and mineral samples arranged on top
large rectangular crate wrapped in black cargo netting
dark metallic corrugated wall panels with vertical ridges
illuminated vertical poster showing a planetary landscape with text

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow sci-fi corridor with metallic walls, passing displays of minerals on illuminated pedestals and stacked cargo crates. A red-haired woman walks ahead in the same direction, leading toward a sales area visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sales counter with vendor and computer terminal

events.description: arriving at the sales counter area from the narrow corridor
initiating dialogue interaction with the vendor behind the sales desk
turning away from the counter and walking back toward the corridor

agents.ego_description: standing at the sales counter engaging with the vendor, then turning and walking away from the desk

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting behind the sales desk operating a computer terminal
red-haired woman standing at the counter beside the ego character

entered.detail: wooden-fronted sales desk with red countertop and computer terminal
illuminated rectangular sign reading SALES mounted above the counter
large wall mural depicting a space scene with blue planet and stars
tall grey metal filing cabinet with multiple drawers

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a sales counter beneath an illuminated SALES sign, where a vendor sits behind a computer. The red-haired woman stands beside the character as they interact with the vendor. The area features a large space mural on the wall and a filing cabinet. After the interaction, the character turns and walks away from the counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow industrial corridor that opens into a futuristic mineral sales hub. It begins by trailing a character through a metallic hallway, passing illuminated pedestals of minerals and stacked cargo crates while following a red-haired woman. As the path widens, the camera arrives at a sales counter beneath a glowing sign, where the character and the woman pause to interact with a vendor seated behind a computer. The scene then expands to reveal a large space mural and a filing cabinet in the background before the character turns and walks away from the counter.
